dynamics.title: Figure 03人形机器人实现工厂量产部署
dynamics.summary: Figure AI宣布其第三代人形机器人Figure 03已在宝马工厂完成首批部署，实现产线物料搬运与质量检测自动化任务。

dynamics.title: Optimus机器人在工厂内实现自主导航与操作
dynamics.summary: 特斯拉展示了Optimus机器人在超级工厂内自主导航、搬运电池组并执行精密组装任务的最新视频。

dynamics.title: 宇树科技发布G1 Pro消费级人形机器人
dynamics.summary: 宇树科技推出G1 Pro人形机器人，配备灵巧手和AI视觉系统，瞄准教育与服务市场。

dynamics.title: Atlas电驱版完成工厂测试并与丰田达成合作
dynamics.summary: 波士顿动力全新电动版Atlas机器人在丰田工厂完成测试，双方签署战略合作协议。

dynamics.title: Digit机器人在亚马逊仓库完成百万次拣选
dynamics.summary: Agility Robotics的Digit双足机器人在亚马逊物流中心累计完成超过100万次商品拣选任务。

financing.summary: Figure AI完成6.75亿美元B轮融资，估值达26亿美元。
Skild AI完成A轮融资，跻身独角兽行列。
Physical Intelligence完成7000万美元种子轮融资。
1X Technologies完成B轮融资，推进NEO家庭机器人研发。
Apptronik完成A轮融资，加速Apollo机器人商业化。

tech.title: NVIDIA发布Project GR00T人形机器人基础模型
tech.summary: NVIDIA推出Project GR00T，专为人形机器人设计的通用基础模型。
tech.significance: 首个面向人形机器人的通用基础模型

tech.title: Figure AI展示端到端视觉-语言-动作模型
tech.summary: Figure AI展示了其自研的VLA模型，可直接从摄像头输入生成关节控制指令。
tech.significance: 端到端学习突破，简化机器人控制流水线

tech.title: Google DeepMind发布RT-2大规模机器人模型
tech.summary: RT-2模型将视觉-语言模型与机器人控制结合，实现跨任务泛化能力。
tech.significance: 视觉-语言-动作统一架构

tech.title: Stanford推出Mobile ALOHA低成本遥操作平台
tech.summary: 斯坦福发布Mobile ALOHA系统，以3.2万美元成本实现双臂移动操作。
tech.significance: 大幅降低具身智能研究成本

tech.title: 波士顿动力Atlas实现全身动态平衡控制突破
tech.summary: 新版电动Atlas采用强化学习训练的全身控制器，可在不规则地形上跑步跳跃。
tech.significance: 强化学习在人形机器人全身控制中的里程碑应用

voices.name: Elon Musk
voices.title: CEO, Tesla
voices.quote: 人形机器人将是有史以来最大的产品，远超汽车业务。
voices.context: 在特斯拉股东大会上讨论Optimus机器人战略

voices.name: Jensen Huang
voices.title: CEO, NVIDIA
voices.quote: 物理AI的ChatGPT时刻即将到来。我们正在构建从芯片到模型的全栈基础设施。
voices.context: 在GTC 2026主题演讲中发布Project GR00T

voices.name: Brett Adcock
voices.title: CEO, Figure AI
voices.quote: 我们的目标是在未来十年内将数十亿台人形机器人部署到全球工厂和家庭中。
voices.context: 在Figure AI B轮融资发布会上

voices.name: Sam Altman
voices.title: CEO, OpenAI
voices.quote: 物理AI是AGI的最后一块拼图。当智能能够操控物理世界时，我们将真正看到AGI的完整形态。
voices.context: 在达沃斯世界经济论坛讨论AI未来

voices.name: Demis Hassabis
voices.title: CEO, Google DeepMind
voices.quote: 具身智能是通向AGI的关键路径之一。机器人需要在真实世界中学习才能获得真正的常识理解能力。

dynamics.title: Private gift brings two Ami humanoid robots to UCCS, expanding access to robotics and physical AI
dynamics.summary: The University of Colorado Colorado Springs has received two Ami humanoid robots through a private gift, expanding educational access to robotics and physical AI technologies.

dynamics.title: $2.5B Wall Street Pitch Tests Whether Warehouse Humanoids Are Ready for Real Work
dynamics.summary: Agility Robotics is seeking $2.5 billion in funding, testing market readiness for warehouse humanoid robots in real-world industrial applications.

dynamics.title: Launches first robotics model in physical AI push
dynamics.summary: Mistral has introduced its first robotics model as part of its broader initiative in the physical AI sector, marking the company's entry into embodied AI.

dynamics.title: Advances the use of Physical AI in production with Figure 03 project in Spartanburg
dynamics.summary: BMW Group is implementing physical AI technology through the Figure 03 project in its Spartanburg facility, enhancing production capabilities.

dynamics.title: Embraces Physical AI With Humanoid Robots
dynamics.summary: A San Diego charter school has integrated humanoid robots into its curriculum, embracing physical AI technologies for educational purposes.

financing.summary: Agility Robotics is seeking $2.5 billion in funding to advance warehouse humanoid robots, testing market readiness for industrial applications.
Apptronik has launched a new humanoid robot specifically designed for warehouse applications, indicating continued investment in the physical AI sector.
The Humanoids Summit is expanding globally with a Seoul edition, indicating growing investment and interest in the humanoid robotics sector.
NVIDIA and Hugging Face are collaborating to bring new models and frameworks to the LeRobot project for the open robotics community.
Paris-based UMA is developing next-generation humanoid robots, with recent funding supporting its vision for advanced physical AI systems.

tech.title: Develop Humanoid Robot Policies End-to-End with NVIDIA Isaac GR00T
tech.summary: NVIDIA has introduced Isaac GR00T, a framework for developing humanoid robot policies end-to-end, representing a significant advancement in physical AI technology.
tech.significance: Enables more sophisticated and adaptable robot behaviors through advanced AI training.

tech.title: Real-time learning powers French AI humanoid for industrial applications
tech.summary: A French AI humanoid robot has demonstrated real-time learning capabilities, allowing it to adapt quickly to industrial applications and environments.
tech.significance: Real-time learning enables robots to handle unexpected situations and improve performance over time.

tech.title: NVIDIA Announces Halos for Robotics, the Industry's First Full-Stack Safety System
tech.summary: NVIDIA has announced Halos for Robotics, the industry's first full-stack safety system specifically designed for physical AI applications.
tech.significance: Addresses critical safety concerns in physical AI deployment, enabling more widespread adoption.

tech.title: NVIDIA and Hugging Face Bring New Models and Frameworks to LeRobot
tech.summary: NVIDIA and Hugging Face are collaborating to provide new models and frameworks to the LeRobot open-source community.
tech.significance: Accelerates development in the open robotics community through shared resources and expertise.

tech.title: Techman Robot introduces Physical AI Development Package
tech.summary: Techman Robot has introduced a Physical AI Development Package to facilitate the integration of AI capabilities into robotic systems.
tech.significance: Lowers the barrier to entry for businesses looking to implement physical AI solutions.

voices.name: European Robotics Experts
voices.title: Industry Analysts
voices.quote: Europe is facing a 'space race of our time' in humanoid robots, struggling to compete with China and US advancements.
voices.context: Discussion on Europe's position in the global humanoid robotics market.

voices.name: Silicon Valley Investors
voices.title: Venture Capitalists
voices.quote: Despite the hype, many top Silicon Valley investors remain skeptical about the near-term viability of humanoid robots in mainstream applications.
voices.context: Investor perspective on the current humanoid robotics boom.

voices.name: Ex-Tesla Engineer
voices.title: Robotics Entrepreneur
voices.quote: We plan to deploy AI robots to replace European retirees in the workforce, addressing demographic challenges through technology.
voices.context: Vision for using humanoid robots to address workforce shortages.

voices.name: Japanese Government Officials
voices.title: Policy Makers
voices.quote: Japan plans to deploy 10 million robots by 2040 across healthcare, food manufacturing, and other sectors as part of our physical AI initiative.
voices.context: National strategy for robotics adoption and physical AI development.

voices.name: Legal Experts
voices.title: Legal Professionals
voices.quote: Physical AI and embodied AI technologies give rise to new legal requirements that must be addressed as these systems become more prevalent.
voices.context: Discussion on emerging legal frameworks for physical AI.
